intro: Apium graveolens, also known as celery seed extract, is often used in skincare products for its potential benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Apium graveolens cream may help to soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and promoting a more even skin tone. However, more research is needed to fully understand the effects of Apium graveolens cream on human skin and its potential benefits in skincare.
